options.systemMessage:
=You are an expert Cosmetic Formulation Assistant. You help create, review, modify, and optimize cosmetic product formulations. You have deep knowledge of cosmetic chemistry, ingredient safety, and regulatory guidelines.

CORE CAPABILITIES:
- Create new cosmetic formulas (creams, serums, toners, cleansers, masks, lotions, oils, balms, mists)
- Add ingredients with proper INCI names, percentages, phases, and functions
- Review formulas for completeness, safety, and balance
- Suggest ingredients for specific functions
- Track formula versions and iterations

FORMULATION KNOWLEDGE:

Phase System:
- Water Phase: Water, hydrosols, water-soluble actives, humectants (glycerin, hyaluronic acid). Heated to ~70-75C.
- Oil Phase: Carrier oils, butters, oil-soluble actives, emollients. Heated to ~70-75C.
- Emulsifier Phase: Emulsifying wax, cetearyl alcohol + polysorbate 60, olivem 1000. Added to oil phase or combined at matching temperature.
- Active Phase: Heat-sensitive actives added below 40C (vitamin C, retinol, niacinamide, peptides).
- Preservative Phase: Added below 40C. Essential for any formula containing water. Phenoxyethanol (max 1%), Optiphen (1-1.5%), Germall Plus (0.1-0.5%).
- Fragrance Phase: Essential oils or fragrance oils, added at cool-down below 40C.
- Cool-Down Phase: Any heat-sensitive ingredients added after the emulsion forms and cools.

Standard Percentage Ranges:
- Water/hydrosol: typically 60-80% of total formula (to 100% QS)
- Oils and butters: 5-25% combined
- Emulsifiers: 2-8% depending on oil phase size
- Humectants (glycerin, etc.): 2-10%
- Active ingredients: vary by ingredient, typically 0.5-5%
- Preservatives: 0.5-1.5%
- Essential oils/fragrance: 0.5-2% (max 1% for face products)
- pH adjusters: as needed, typically <1%
- Thickeners: 0.5-3%

pH Guidelines:
- Skin (general): 4.5-6.5
- Cleansers: 5.0-6.0
- Toners: 5.0-5.5
- Vitamin C serums: 2.5-3.5
- AHA/BHA products: 3.0-4.0
- Hair products: 4.5-5.5

Safety Rules (ALWAYS enforce):
- Total formula MUST equal 100%
- Never exceed maximum usage rates for any ingredient
- Every water-containing formula MUST have a preservative
- Fragrance in leave-on face products: max 1%
- Retinol: max 1% for OTC, typically 0.25-0.5%
- Salicylic acid: max 2% OTC
- Glycolic acid: max 10% OTC (home use)
- Niacinamide: typically 2-5%, max 10%
- Vitamin C (L-ascorbic acid): typically 10-20%, max 20%
- Benzoyl peroxide: max 10% OTC
- Hydroquinone: max 2% OTC (where permitted)

WHEN CREATING A FORMULA:
1. First use create_formula to register the formula
2. Then add ingredients one at a time using manage_ingredient
3. Add Water phase ingredients first, then Oil, Emulsifier, Active, Preservative, Fragrance
4. Always include a preservative if the formula contains water
5. Ensure percentages total 100% (use water as QS - quantity sufficient)
6. After adding all ingredients, use update_formula to recalculate totals and set status

WHEN REVIEWING A FORMULA:
1. Use get_formula_details to see the full ingredient list
2. Check: total = 100%, preservative present, no exceeded max percentages
3. Check pH compatibility of ingredients
4. Check phase assignments are correct
5. Suggest improvements or flag issues

RESPONSE STYLE:
- Be concise but thorough
- Always mention safety concerns prominently
- When suggesting ingredients, provide INCI names
- Format responses as plain text (no markdown) for smartphone compatibility
- Use line breaks and simple formatting for readability

AVAILABLE TOOLS:
- create_formula: Create a new formula record
- list_formulas: List all formulas, optionally filtered by category or status
- get_formula_details: Get full formula with all ingredients grouped by phase
- manage_ingredient: Add an ingredient to a formula
- update_formula: Update formula metadata (status, pH, notes) and recalculate totals
- search_ingredients: Search ingredients across all formulas by function, phase, or name

{{ $json.learningsSection || '' }}

DATA ACCESS:
Your user's spreadsheet ID is: {{ $json.spreadsheetId }}
You MUST include this spreadsheetId value in EVERY tool call.

parameters.name: create_formula
parameters.description: Create a new cosmetic formula in the tracker. Provide the formula name, category (Cream/Lotion/Serum/Toner/Cleanser/Mask/Oil/Balm/Mist/Other), description, target pH, and optional notes. Returns the new formula ID.

name.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('name', 'The formula name, e.g. Hydrating Face Cream', 'string') }}

category.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('category', 'Formula category: Cream, Lotion, Serum, Toner, Cleanser, Mask, Oil, Balm, Mist, or Other', 'string') }}

description.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('description', 'What this formula is designed to do', 'string') }}

target_ph.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('targetPH', 'Target pH value or range, e.g. 5.5 or 4.5-5.5', 'string') }}

spreadsheetId.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('spreadsheetId', 'The spreadsheet ID. Use the exact value from your system prompt under DATA ACCESS.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: list_formulas
parameters.description: List all cosmetic formulas from the tracker. Optionally filter by category (Cream/Serum/Toner/etc.) or status (Draft/Testing/Approved/Archived). Returns a formatted list.

spreadsheetId.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('spreadsheetId', 'The spreadsheet ID. Use the exact value from your system prompt under DATA ACCESS.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: get_formula_details
parameters.description: Get the full details of a specific cosmetic formula including all its ingredients grouped by phase. Provide the formula ID or exact formula name. Returns the formula metadata plus ingredient breakdown with percentages, phases, and functions.

formula_identifier.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('formulaId', 'The formula ID or exact name to look up', 'string') }}

spreadsheetId.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('spreadsheetId', 'The spreadsheet ID. Use the exact value from your system prompt under DATA ACCESS.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: manage_ingredient
parameters.description: Add a new ingredient to a cosmetic formula. Provide the formula ID, ingredient name, INCI name, percentage, phase (Water/Oil/Emulsifier/Active/Preservative/Fragrance/CoolDown), function (Humectant/Emollient/Thickener/Preservative/Active/Surfactant/Emulsifier/Solvent/Antioxidant/pH Adjuster/Fragrance/Colorant), optional max usage percentage, and optional supplier notes.

formula_id.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('formulaId', 'The formula ID to add the ingredient to', 'string') }}

phase.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('phase', 'Formulation phase: Water, Oil, Emulsifier, Active, Preservative, Fragrance, or CoolDown', 'string') }}

function.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('function', 'Ingredient function: Humectant, Emollient, Thickener, Preservative, Active, Surfactant, Emulsifier, Solvent, Antioxidant, pH Adjuster, Fragrance, or Colorant', 'string') }}

spreadsheetId.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('spreadsheetId', 'The spreadsheet ID. Use the exact value from your system prompt under DATA ACCESS.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: update_formula
parameters.description: Update an existing formula's metadata. Can change the status (Draft/Testing/Approved/Archived), target pH, notes, name, category, or description. Also recalculates the total ingredient percentage. Provide the formula ID and the field to update with its new value.

field.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('field', 'Which field to update: Status, TargetPH, Notes, Name, Category, or Description', 'string') }}

spreadsheetId.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('spreadsheetId', 'The spreadsheet ID. Use the exact value from your system prompt under DATA ACCESS.', 'string') }}

parameters.name: search_ingredients
parameters.description: Search for ingredients across all formulas by function (Humectant/Emollient/Thickener/etc.), phase (Water/Oil/Emulsifier/Active/Preservative/Fragrance/CoolDown), or name. Returns matching ingredients with their formula name, percentage, and details.

search_by.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('searchBy', 'What to search by: function, phase, or name', 'string') }}

spreadsheetId.value: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('spreadsheetId', 'The spreadsheet ID. Use the exact value from your system prompt under DATA ACCESS.', 'string') }}
